bead.title: Deprecate Idempotency-Key header in favor of canonical body field
bead.description: CONTRACT-001 (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-001-http-api-surface.md) makes the request-body idempotency field canonical; the Idempotency-Key HTTP header is deprecated. The server still treats the header as a primary input. Accept the body field as canonical, emit a deprecation signal when only the header is supplied, and document the sunset.
bead.acceptance: Transaction/commit requests honor the body idempotency field; requests using only the Idempotency-Key header still succeed but receive a Deprecation/Warning response header; an HTTP contract test in crates/axon-server/tests/api_contract.rs covers both paths and passes.
